ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoes" (
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the shoe */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style name or code of the shoe */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the shoe */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the shoe model */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the shoe */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the shoe is designed (Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the shoe */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of sizes available for the shoe model */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the shoe is manufactured */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the shoe's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shoe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe model this size relates to */,
  "berluti_size" REAL /* Berluti size equivalent */,
  "french_size" REAL /* French size equivalent */,
  "italian_size" REAL /* Italian size equivalent */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US size equivalent */,
  "japan_size" REAL /* Japanese size equivalent */,
  "korean_size" INTEGER /* Korean size equivalent */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to a size chart specific to the shoe model */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is a standard size for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoes ("shoe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in this region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language used in the region */,
  "shipping_options" TEXT /* Available shipping options in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe model */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the inventory is tracked */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shoes available in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Selling price in the region's currency */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last inventory update */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the shoe model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoes ("shoe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe model sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Selling price at the time of sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold in the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Order number for the sale */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size entry related to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoes ("shoe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the customer is located */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the retailer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return transaction */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale transaction being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the shoe was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "return_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the returned item (New, Used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe model for which size is being recommended */,
  "recommended_size" REAL /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the size recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoes ("shoe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the trend */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size entry related to the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend observation */,
  "trend_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shoes sold in that size during the period */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size trend is observed */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size trend is observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
